text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Trainer! You're really good at claw
machines, huh?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
If I follow your example and think more about
where the claw is going to grab, then... Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
All right, now it's my turn to get that stuffed
spider. Just you watch!
